requirement_topic.en: Refrigerant / HFC Phase-Down — R-600a Flammable Refrigerant Handling (IBAMA / Kigali Amendment + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24)
requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂／HFC削减——R-600a可燃制冷剂处理（IBAMA / 基加利修正案 + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24）
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑／HFC削減——R-600a可燃製冷劑處理（IBAMA / 基加利修正案 + ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24）

summary.en: Brazil regulates hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs) under its implementation of the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol, administered by IBAMA (Instituto Brasileiro do Meio Ambiente e dos Recursos Naturais Renováveis) together with the Ministry of the Environment, with import quotas and a phase-down schedule for HFCs. Household refrigerators and freezers marketed in Brazil have overwhelmingly transitioned to R-600a (isobutane, GWP about 3) — a hydrocarbon refrigerant outside the HFC phase-down scope and well-positioned under the Kigali regime. Manufacturers must: (1) verify the refrigerant charge complies with ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant requirements (maximum R-600a charge per compartment configuration, ventilation and ignition-source requirements); (2) declare the refrigerant type and charge quantity (grams) in product documentation; (3) if the appliance contains any HFC (e.g., R134a, GWP 1430) or HFO, confirm it is consistent with Brazil's HFC import-quota and phase-down controls under IBAMA; (4) note that any controlled-substance importation interfaces with IBAMA licensing. R-600a domestic appliance charges are far below thresholds that would impose technician-certification obligations, so routine service of R-600a domestic appliances does not trigger controlled-substance handling requirements in practice.
summary.zh: 巴西依据其对《蒙特利尔议定书基加利修正案》的实施对氢氟烃（HFC）进行管控，由IBAMA（巴西环境与可再生自然资源研究所）会同环境部管理，设有HFC进口配额及削减时间表。巴西市场销售的家用电冰箱和冷冻箱已大量转向使用R-600a（异丁烷，全球变暖潜能值约3）——一种不在HFC削减范围内、在基加利制度下具备良好条件的碳氢化合物制冷剂。制造商须：（1）核实制冷剂充注量符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂要求（每种隔间配置的R-600a最大充注量、通风及点火源要求）；（2）在产品文件中声明制冷剂类型及充注量（克）；（3）若器具含有任何HFC（如R134a，GWP 1430）或HFO，须确认其符合IBAMA管控的巴西HFC进口配额及削减控制；（4）注意任何受控物质的进口须与IBAMA许可衔接。R-600a家用器具的充注量远低于会施加技术人员资质义务的门槛，因此实际操作中R-600a家用器具的日常维修不触发受控物质处理要求。
summary.zht: 巴西依據其對《蒙特利爾議定書基加利修正案》的實施對氫氟碳化物（HFC）進行管控，由IBAMA（巴西環境與可再生自然資源研究所）會同環境部管理，設有HFC進口配額及削減時間表。巴西市場銷售的家用電冰箱和冷凍箱已大量轉向使用R-600a（異丁烷，全球暖化潛能值約3）——一種不在HFC削減範圍內、在基加利制度下具備良好條件的碳氫化合物製冷劑。製造商須：（1）核實製冷劑充注量符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑要求（每種隔間配置的R-600a最大充注量、通風及點火源要求）；（2）在產品文件中聲明製冷劑類型及充注量（克）；（3）若器具含有任何HFC（如R134a，GWP 1430）或HFO，須確認其符合IBAMA管控的巴西HFC進口配額及削減控制；（4）注意任何受控物質的進口須與IBAMA許可銜接。R-600a家用器具的充注量遠低於會施加技術人員資質義務的門檻，因此實際操作中R-600a家用器具的日常維修不觸發受控物質處理要求。

standards_or_laws: Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — Brazil's HFC phase-down (administered by IBAMA / Ministry of the Environment, with import quotas)
ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 — Annex requirements for appliances using flammable refrigerants (R-600a charge limits, ventilation, ignition-source requirements)
ISO 817 — Refrigerants — Designation and safety classification (R-600a classified A3: lower flammability)
IBAMA import-control / licensing for controlled substances (ozone-depleting substances and HFCs)

summary.en: China regulates refrigerant use primarily through GB 9237-2001 (Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps — general and related definitions; aligned with ISO 5149) and the more recent GB/T 5773-2016 (Performance test methods for positive displacement refrigerant compressors). For household appliances, EN 60335-2-24 equivalent refrigerant charge limits are addressed in GB 4706.13-2014 (which incorporates R600a flammability provisions derived from IEC 60335-2-24). China has not adopted an equivalent to the EU F-Gas phase-down schedule for HFCs in refrigeration; China operates its HFC phase-down under the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol (ratified June 2021), with its own schedule administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE). Chinese appliance manufacturers exporting with R600a units are generally well-positioned for the refrigerant aspect, but must verify charge amounts and documentation against the destination market's requirements.
summary.zh: 中国主要通过GB 9237-2001（制冷系统和热泵的安全要求——一般要求和分类；参照ISO 5149）及较新的GB/T 5773-2016（容积式制冷剂压缩机性能试验方法）对制冷剂使用进行管理。家用器具方面，EN 60335-2-24等效的制冷剂充注量限制已纳入GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R600a可燃性规定）。中国尚未采用与欧盟HFC氟气体削减计划等效的制冷领域法规；中国依据《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）执行HFC削减计划，由生态环境部管理。使用R600a制冷剂的中国器具制造商在制冷剂方面一般具备较好的出口条件，但仍须核实充注量及文件是否符合目的地市场要求。
summary.zht: 中國主要通過GB 9237-2001（製冷系統和熱泵的安全要求——一般要求和分類；參照ISO 5149）及較新的GB/T 5773-2016（容積式製冷劑壓縮機性能試驗方法）對製冷劑使用進行管理。家用器具方面，EN 60335-2-24等效的製冷劑充注量限制已納入GB 4706.13-2014（其中包含源自IEC 60335-2-24的R600a可燃性規定）。中國尚未採用與歐盟HFC氟氣體削減計畫等效的製冷領域法規；中國依據《基加利修正案》（2021年6月批准加入）執行HFC削減計畫，由生態環境部管理。使用R600a製冷劑的中國器具製造商在製冷劑方面一般具備較好的出口條件，但仍須核實充注量及文件是否符合目的地市場要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13-2014 — Annex provisions for flammable refrigerant (R600a) requirements in household refrigerating appliances (derived from IEC 60335-2-24)
GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (aligned with ISO 5149:1993)
Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — China HFC phase-down schedule (ratified June 2021, administered by MEE)

gap.en: For R-600a appliances, the main gap is documentation and charge verification rather than a fundamental technology gap: (1) Brazilian product documentation must explicitly state the refrigerant designation (R-600a / isobutane), charge weight in grams, and relevant safety precautions per ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24; (2) The exact R-600a charge against ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 maximum limits must be verified — these are a function of room volume and appliance configuration; Chinese CCC test reports may not explicitly confirm Brazilian charge-limit compliance if tested under slightly different configurations or supply conditions (60 Hz vs 50 Hz); (3) If any appliance in the export range still uses R134a or another HFC, the manufacturer must assess Brazil's HFC import-quota and phase-down controls administered by IBAMA, and any controlled-substance importation must be reconciled with IBAMA licensing. [NOTE: The exact Brazilian HFC phase-down milestones and any product-level restrictions under IBAMA / the Kigali implementation should be confirmed against current IBAMA and Ministry of the Environment instruments before regulatory submissions.]
gap.zh: 对于R-600a器具，主要差距在于文件和充注量核实，而非根本性技术差距：（1）巴西产品文件须明确说明制冷剂名称（R-600a/异丁烷）、充注量（克）及依据ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24的相关安全注意事项；（2）须核实R-600a充注量是否符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24最大限值——该限值取决于房间容积和器具配置；若中国CCC检测报告在略有不同的配置或供电条件（60 Hz对50 Hz）下进行测试，可能未明确确认符合巴西充注量限值；（3）若出口产品系列中仍有器具使用R134a或其他HFC，制造商须评估由IBAMA管理的巴西HFC进口配额及削减控制，且任何受控物质的进口须与IBAMA许可衔接。【注：应在监管提交前针对IBAMA及环境部现行文件确认巴西HFC削减里程碑及任何产品层面的限制。】
gap.zht: 對於R-600a器具，主要差距在於文件和充注量核實，而非根本性技術差距：（1）巴西產品文件須明確說明製冷劑名稱（R-600a/異丁烷）、充注量（克）及依據ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24的相關安全注意事項；（2）須核實R-600a充注量是否符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24最大限值——該限值取決於房間容積和器具配置；若中國CCC檢測報告在略有不同的配置或供電條件（60 Hz對50 Hz）下進行測試，可能未明確確認符合巴西充注量限值；（3）若出口產品系列中仍有器具使用R134a或其他HFC，製造商須評估由IBAMA管理的巴西HFC進口配額及削減控制，且任何受控物質的進口須與IBAMA許可銜接。【註：應在監管提交前針對IBAMA及環境部現行文件確認巴西HFC削減里程碑及任何產品層面的限制。】

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 flammable-refrigerant charge limits are mandatory within INMETRO certification; HFC import-quota and phase-down controls under Brazil's Kigali implementation are administered by IBAMA; controlled-substance importation requires IBAMA licensing
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory at appliance level via GB 4706.13-2014 (R600a charge limits); China HFC phase-down under Kigali Amendment administered by MEE — separate from Brazil's IBAMA-administered regime

source.publisher: IBAMA — Instituto Brasileiro do Meio Ambiente e dos Recursos Naturais Renováveis

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] R-600a is the dominant refrigerant in Brazilian-market household refrigerators and is outside the HFC phase-down scope, so it is well-positioned under Brazil's Kigali implementation administered by IBAMA. However, manufacturers must verify R-600a charge against ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24 limits and explicitly document refrigerant type and charge weight. Any HFC-based models, and any importation of controlled substances, should be assessed against IBAMA's HFC import-quota and licensing controls before Brazilian market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] R-600a是巴西市场家用电冰箱的主流制冷剂，不在HFC削减范围内，因此在由IBAMA管理的巴西基加利实施框架下具备良好条件。但制造商须核实R-600a充注量是否符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24限值，并明确记录制冷剂类型及充注量。任何含HFC的型号及任何受控物质的进口，在进入巴西市场前须依据IBAMA的HFC进口配额及许可控制进行评估。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] R-600a是巴西市場家用電冰箱的主流製冷劑，不在HFC削減範圍內，因此在由IBAMA管理的巴西基加利實施框架下具備良好條件。但製造商須核實R-600a充注量是否符合ABNT NBR IEC 60335-2-24限值，並明確記錄製冷劑類型及充注量。任何含HFC的型號及任何受控物質的進口，在進入巴西市場前須依據IBAMA的HFC進口配額及許可控制進行評估。
